one_liner: Trip.com is a leading international online travel agency that provides a comprehensive one-stop travel platform for booking flights, hotels, trains, car rentals, and tour packages.
differentiators: Global reach with millions of users
proof_points: Extensive inventory of flights and hotels
Seamless booking experience across all travel needs
core_messages: Booking travel should be easy and rewarding
Travel with confidence with our 24/7 support
preferred_cta: Book your next trip on Trip.com and experience the ease of one-stop travel planning.
prohibited_claims: Do not claim to be the only travel agency
Do not guarantee the absolute lowest price for every single trip
Do not promise zero delays or issues in travel
